mapper.insert: INSERT INTO private_message (sender_id, recipient_id, content, is_read) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{recipientId}, #{content}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.sender_id AS senderId, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS senderName, u.avatar AS senderAvatar, m.recipient_id AS recipientId, m.content, (m.is_read = 1) AS `read`, m.create_time AS createTime FROM private_message m LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.recipient_id = #{otherId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{otherId} AND m.recipient_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m.create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM private_message WHERE recipient_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT other_id AS otherUserId, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS otherUserName, u.avatar AS otherUserAvatar, last_content AS lastMessageContent, (last_sender_id = #{userId}) AS lastMessageByMe, unread_cnt AS unreadCount, last_time AS lastMessageTime FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN recipient_id ELSE sender_id END AS other_id, SUBSTRING( (SELECT m2.content FROM private_message m2 WHERE (m2.sender_id = #{userId} AND m2.recipient_id = CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN recipient_id ELSE sender_id END) OR (m2.sender_id = CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN recipient_id ELSE sender_id END AND m2.recipient_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m2.create_time DESC LIMIT 1), 1, 60 ) AS last_content, (SELECT m3.sender_id FROM private_message m3 WHERE (m3.sender_id = #{userId} AND m3.recipient_id = CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN recipient_id ELSE sender_id END) OR (m3.sender_id = CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN recipient_id ELSE sender_id END AND m3.recipient_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m3.create_time DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_sender_id, MAX(create_time) AS last_time, SUM(CASE WHEN recipient_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unread_cnt FROM private_message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR recipient_id = #{userId} GROUP BY other_id ) conv LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = conv.other_id ORDER BY last_time DESC
